subject: Unity Input System adapter for Semantic Interaction
resolved_first_review_findings: live InputAction callback capture for started, performed, and canceled phases
asset, index, and field-specific validation diagnostics
duplicate intent, context, route, suggestion, and observation-route rejection
reviewed_boundaries: deterministic ScriptableObject-to-Core conversion without authored-asset mutation
explicit InputActionReference and stable action and binding GUID identity
caller-owned observation stamps and explicit route candidate order
typed Input System phase and value conversion
binding display, suggestion, and override seams
absence of scene search, product commands, renderer, XRI, OpenXR, vendor, and device claims
non_claims: This advisory Agent review does not replace maintainer approval or exact-consumer validation.
It grants no maturity, release, accessibility, comfort, XR runtime, or device claim.
